note: Single GPU-SDL retry pass on 2026-05-12 after operator lifted the 2026-05-10 AKT-spend deferral. Same retry recipe as the 2026-05-06 closure pass (--exclude-provider akash1sevd..., --prefer-provider akash1st7..., XION_AKASH_HEALTH_SMOKE_SEC=300, XION_AKASH_SEND_MANIFEST_TIMEOUT_SEC=300). Preferred provider akash1st7... did not bid this round. Cheapest non-excluded full-resource bidder (akash17wh..., RTX4090) won the lease, accepted it on-chain, then refused the manifest at submit time. AkashService.deploy_relay() auto-closed the deployment cleanly; lease collateral fully refunded. Per the approved plan, no silent retry was attempted; operator selected option 1 (post a dated slip and continue with Chutes/SN64 warm primary).

bids_observed.outcome: excluded by flag (also offered 800/4000 CPU, bid-shape gaming)

attempts.detail: provider-services send-manifest exit 1: 'submit manifest to some providers has been failed'

kw_floor_deploy_001_status: remains mitigated-residual; dated residue 2026-05-10 → 2026-07-09 holds. Today's attempt reaffirms the pattern: even with the 2026-05-06 retry recipe, the preferred provider does not reliably bid, and the cheapest non-excluded full-resource bidder refuses the manifest. This is now the third consecutive failure round (2026-05-03, 2026-05-06, 2026-05-10 evening, 2026-05-12) under identical doctrine.
next_step_options_for_operator: Hold the dated residue until 2026-07-09 and let Chutes/SN64 remain warm primary (operator-selected today)
Pursue a bilateral relationship with a known-good GPU provider (out-of-band trust, not Akash-market price race)
Wait for provider-side improvements to forwarded-ingress reliability across the Akash market
